article1.content: The most powerful tool for communicating with LLMs (Large Language Models), the core of modern AI technology, is the 'prompt'. Beyond simple questions, prompts serve as a compass that guides the thinking process of AI, stimulates creativity, and leads to optimal results. A well-designed prompt can replace hundreds of lines of code or provide powerful efficiency that solves complex business processes in just seconds.

article2.header: 🚀 Essential Skill in the AI Era
article2.content: As high-performance AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini evolve, how you 'ask' and 'instruct' has become a core competitive advantage, going beyond simply using tools. The essence of prompt engineering lies in clearly setting the context, assigning specific personas, and elaborately handling constraints on output formats.

article3.content: PromptGenie provides a high-quality prompt library verified by elite prompt engineers worldwide. Explore optimized prompts in various categories such as business analysis, creative writing, and professional coding. Our library will be your strongest partner in helping you utilize AI's potential 100%.

items.question: What is PromptGenie?
items.answer: PromptGenie is a prompt engineering platform that helps you get the best performance from AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. It provides a verified prompt library and tools to create and optimize your own prompts.

items.question: Why is prompt engineering important?
items.answer: Even with the same AI model, the quality of the answer depends entirely on the quality of the prompt. Through prompt engineering, you can reduce AI hallucinations and get more accurate, creative results that better match your intentions.

items.question: Is this service free?
items.answer: Yes, the basic prompt library browsing and generation features of PromptGenie are currently free. We aim to help everyone easily utilize AI technology. Premium plans with advanced analytics may be introduced in the future.

items.question: Can I share my own prompts?
items.answer: Absolutely! PromptGenie is oriented toward community-driven growth. You can share your unique prompts through the 'Contributors' page and refine them further through feedback from other users.

Guide.title: Prompt Engineering Guide
Guide.subtitle: Learn effective communication techniques to unlock 100% of AI performance.

intro.title: What is Prompt Engineering?
intro.content: Prompt engineering is the art of designing and optimizing inputs (prompts) to get the best possible results from AI models like ChatGPT, Claude, and Gemini. Beyond just asking questions, it's about making AI understand context accurately and respond in the desired format and tone.

basic.title: Key 4 Elements (Framework)
basic.subtitle: Good prompts are most powerful when they include these four elements.

role.title: Role Assignment
role.desc: Assign a specific expert identity to the AI.
role.example: "You are a senior marketer with 10 years of experience."

context.title: Context Provision
context.desc: Provide background knowledge and describe specific situations.
context.example: "I am planning an SNS ad campaign for a small business."

task.title: Clear Task
task.desc: Give specific instructions for the work to be performed.

style.title: Output Style/Constraint
style.example: "Write in a friendly tone, under 100 characters each, in a table format."

fewShot.title: Few-Shot Prompting
fewShot.desc: Provide a few examples of the desired output to improve quality.
fewShot.example: Input: Apple -> Output: Red, Input: Banana -> Output: Yellow, Input: Grape -> Output: ?

cot.title: Chain of Thought (CoT)
cot.desc: Instruct AI to 'think step by step' to solve complex logic problems.
cot.example: "Reason through this step-by-step to solve the problem and explain your process."

Guide.closing: Check out verified prompts in the library and start practicing now!

rule1.name: Role Assignment
rule1.desc: Assign a specific expert identity to the AI.

rule2.name: Constraints
rule2.desc: Be clear about what NOT to do.

rule3.name: Few-Shot Learning
rule3.desc: Provide examples of expected input/output pairs.

modelsItems.name: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
modelsItems.desc: Strong reasoning and general knowledge. Excellent at CoT.

modelsItems.name: Claude (Anthropic)
modelsItems.desc: Natural coding and creative writing. High safety standards.

modelsItems.name: Gemini (Google)
modelsItems.desc: Deep integration with Google services. Multimodal expert.

zeroShot.title: Zero-Shot Prompting
zeroShot.desc: The most basic technique for getting results by direct instruction without examples.
zeroShot.example: Analyze the sentiment of the following sentence: 'The weather is really nice today'
zeroShot.note: Effective for clear tasks such as simple classification, summarization, and translation.

fewShot.title: Few-Shot Prompting
fewShot.desc: A technique for training AI on desired patterns by providing 2-5 input/output examples.
fewShot.example: Positive: Good weather → 😊, Negative: Raining → 😢, Analysis: I feel bad today → ?
fewShot.note: Very effective when results of a specific format, logic, or style are required.

cot.title: Chain of Thought (CoT)
cot.desc: A technique that instructs the AI to 'think step-by-step' to go through a reasoning process.
cot.example: Solve this problem step-by-step. Explain the logical basis for each step.
cot.note: Greatly improves accuracy in complex analyses such as math problems, logical reasoning, and code debugging.

rolePlaying.title: Role Playing
rolePlaying.desc: A technique that assigns AI a role as a specific expert, character, or perspective.
rolePlaying.example: You are a UX design lead with 10 years of experience. Please critically review this app's onboarding flow.
rolePlaying.note: Applicable for professional advice, multifaceted analysis, interview practice, etc.

structuredOutput.title: Structured Output
structuredOutput.desc: A technique for obtaining structured results by specifying formatting such as JSON, tables, or Markdown.
structuredOutput.example: Output the analysis results in the following JSON format: {"sentiment": string, "score": number}
structuredOutput.note: Essential when automated processing is required, such as data processing pipelines or API response generation.

comparisonItems.bad: Write a short story about a cat.
comparisonItems.badAnalysis: Too vague. AI cannot know the context for tone, length, or plot.
comparisonItems.good: Act like a professional creative writer. Write a witty short story of about 300 characters about a cat who is actually a secret agent. Focus on a tense meeting in a rainy alley.
comparisonItems.goodAnalysis: Includes a clear persona, specific constraints, and clear plot context.

writing.title: ✍️ Writing
writing.desc: Assign a precise role, and specify the desired tone, length, and target audience.

coding.title: 💻 Coding
coding.desc: Specify programming languages, framework versions, technology stacks, and desired output format (e.g., code blocks, with comments).

business.title: 📊 Business
business.desc: Describe the specific situation and purpose, such as email writing or report summarization.

learning.title: 🎓 Learning
learning.desc: Assign a tutor role to the AI and ask for explanations that fit your level.

ideas.title: 💡 Ideas
ideas.desc: Set modes such as 'free thinking' or 'critical review' during brainstorming.

design.title: 🎨 Design/Planning
design.desc: Provide details such as target users, service characteristics, and design guidelines.

mistakesItems.title: Too Vague Instructions
mistakesItems.desc: Avoid unspecific prompts like 'write a good post'.
mistakesItems.solution: Specify the topic, length, tone, target audience, and output format.

mistakesItems.title: Lack of Context
mistakesItems.desc: Don't let the AI answer without any background knowledge.
mistakesItems.solution: Provide sufficient relevant background information and constraints.

glossaryItems.desc: Large Language Model. An AI language model trained on massive amounts of data.
A phenomenon where AI manipulates information or speaks incorrect answers with confidence.
The amount of information that AI can remember and process at once.
